title: tephrosia cephalantha
intro: Tephrosia cephalantha, also known as the Yellow Pea Bush, is a flowering plant that belongs to the pea family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia cephalantha include reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
